title: ixora vaughanii
intro: Ixora vaughanii, also known as the Sri Lankan or Ceylonese ixora, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant with vibrant red flowers that are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Ixora vaughanii include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its use in treating fever, wounds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Ixora vaughanii include teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and skin irritations, while also promoting overall well-being.
